description_long: This arcade game cabinet, titled 'THE CITY', features a classic upright design with a prominent rectangular display section at the top and a slanted playfield below. The front panel includes a digital score display and a coin slot, while the control panel is simple and uncluttered. The side panels are decorated with bold blue graphics, featuring the game's title 'THE CITY' in large yellow letters, and a cityscape motif with a small airplane flying above. The marquee at the top is visually striking, with a city skyline and clouds, reinforcing the urban theme. The cabinet stands on four sturdy metal legs, giving it stability and a slightly elevated stance. The materials appear to be a combination of painted wood or MDF, metal, and plastic, typical for arcade machines.
description: A blue upright arcade game cabinet with 'THE CITY' graphics, a digital display, and a city-themed marquee. The side panels feature bold lettering and urban artwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital score display, coin slot, and the marquee with 'THE CITY' and cityscape artwork.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large 'THE CITY' text and cityscape graphics on the blue side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain blue back of the cabinet with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'THE CITY' text and cityscape graphics visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a simple control panel, digital display, and coin slot; no visible joysticks or buttons.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'THE CITY' text, a city skyline, clouds, and a small airplane in a colorful, urban-themed style.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels display large 'THE CITY' text with a cityscape motif and a blue background.
